goals.title: 压缩/解压 ZIP
goals.evidence: TC:0 err, tests:75/75 passed, runtime:PASS (11/11 zip+unzip roundtrip checks incl unicode/empty-dir/spaces), security:clean

goals.title: Invert Selection (反选)
goals.objective: Ctrl+Shift+I 或右键菜单加「反选」,选中当前目录所有未选中项
goals.evidence: file-store.ts selectInvert() + command-catalog.ts Ctrl+Shift+I + command-dispatcher.ts. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: 属性对话框 (modal)
goals.objective: 独立 modal 展示选中项的完整属性(大小/时间戳/路径/权限)
goals.evidence: 右键属性已从 toast 改为 PropertiesPanel modal (dispatch tabula:show-properties). TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: 橡皮筋选择 (拖框选)
goals.objective: 文件列表拖出矩形选框,选中框内所有项
goals.evidence: FileList.tsx: global mouse move/up listeners + getEntriesInRect() via fixed 28px index math. CSS: .rubber-band-rect overlay. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: 详情视图列头点击排序
goals.objective: 详情视图点击列头按该列排序
goals.evidence: SortHeader with onSort={cycleSort} already exists in FileList.tsx lines 617-641. cycleSort in file-store.ts lines 786-799 cycles asc→desc→null. Already fully implemented.

goals.title: Quick Look 快捷键
goals.evidence: App.tsx keydown handler added Space→tabula:toggle-preview. TC:0.

goals.title: Group By (分组)
goals.objective: 按类型/日期/大小 分组显示
goals.evidence: store: GroupByMode type + setGroupBy action. FileList: GroupByBar (type/date/size) + groupEntries() + DetailsView grouped virtualizer rendering. CSS: .file-list-group-bar + .file-list-group-header. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: Tags (标记)
goals.evidence: main/store/tags-store.ts (electron-store) + IPC handlers + preload bridge + api.ts types + ContextMenu tag submenu with color presets + custom tag input. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: Lock File (只读/锁定)
goals.objective: 右键文件属性设只读/锁定
goals.evidence: IPC fs:setPermissions (chmod 0o444/0o644) + bridge channel + preload + api.ts type + ContextMenu lock/unlock items. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: Make Alias / 符号链接
goals.evidence: fs:create-symlink IPC (junction mode) + bridge channel + preload + api.ts + ContextMenu '创建快捷方式'. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: Undo / Redo (操作栈)
goals.evidence: main/undo/undo-manager.ts (undo/redo/executeUndo) + IPC handlers + bridge channels + preload + App.tsx Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: 批量重命名
goals.evidence: command-catalog entry + command-dispatcher file.batch-rename + ContextMenu '批量重命名' (选2+项时显示). BatchRenameDialog already existed. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: Show in Folder 后保留选中
goals.objective: Shell打开文件夹后保留Tabula内选中项
goals.note: Requires window activation detection (Electron does not expose 'app returned from background' event). Need: store savedSelection + BrowserWindow.on('focus') restore, or preload 'app-bridge' event. Marked pending until architecture decision.

goals.title: 文件校验和 SHA-256
goals.evidence: fs:checksum IPC (crypto.createHash streaming) + bridge channel + preload + api.ts type + ContextMenu '计算 SHA-256'. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: 目录大小计算改善
goals.objective: 计算文件夹大小后台异步化+取消支持
goals.evidence: DirSizeJob registry + cancelDirSize(jobId) + fs:cancel-dir-size IPC + CANCELLED error code. TC:0, tests 75/75 passed.

goals.title: tar / tgz 支持
goals.note: fflate 0.8.3 没有 tar API。需要额外库（如 tar-stream）并加依赖。跳过，等 P2 或后续迭代。

goals.title: 选中文件拖拽到外部App
goals.evidence: IPC fs:start-drag (channels.ts FS_START_DRAG + ipc/index.ts handler) + preload + api.ts + FileList.tsx handleRowDragStart calls window.tabula.fs.startDrag(paths) using Electron webContents.startDrag API. NativeImage from first file used as drag icon. TC:0, vitest 75/75.

goals.title: 按类型筛选工具栏
goals.objective: Finder工具栏文件类型快速筛选
goals.evidence: 功能已移除：Toolbar 筛选按钮、file-store typeFilter 字段及 computeFilteredSorted 中的过滤逻辑全部删除。TC:0, vitest 75/75.
